title: agrimonia pilosa f. typica
intro: Agrimonia pilosa f. typica, also known as soft agrimony, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of soft agrimony include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive problems, while its herbal preparations can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures. Soft agrimony is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote wound healing and reduce swelling.
